zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Scrope於大約1476年出生在英國越可爾武普薩爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Scrope48歲，母親Elizabeth Greystoke42歲。她於1493年11月21日之後與Sir Christopher Danby結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1531年3月25日之後在英國越可爾利德斯，埋葬在英國越可爾利德斯 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Scrope于大约1476年出生在英国越可爾武普薩爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Scrope48岁，母亲Elizabeth Greystoke42岁。她于1493年11月21日之后与Sir Christopher Danby结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1531年3月25日之后在英国越可爾利德斯，埋葬在英国越可爾利德斯 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Scrope was born about 1476, in Upsall, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Scrope, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth Greystoke, was 42. She married Sir Christopher Danby after 21 November 1493. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 25 March 1531, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Scrope est née environ 1476, à Upsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Scrope, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Greystoke, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Danby après 21 novembre 1493. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 25 mars 1531, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Leeds St Peter, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Scrope um 1476 in Upsall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Scrope 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Greystoke 42. Sie hat nach 21. November 1493 Sir Christopher Danby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 25. März 1531 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Scropeが約1476年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウプサルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Scropeは48歳，母Elizabeth Greystokeは42歳であった。1493年11月21日以後にSir Christopher Danbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1531年3月25日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーズ スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Scrope(이)가 대략 1476년 영국 요르크실르 업사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Scrope(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Greystoke(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1493년 11월 21일 이후 Sir Christopher Danby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 3월 25일 이후 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리드즈 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Scrope nasceu aproximadamente 1476, em Upsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Scrope, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Greystoke, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Danby após 21 de novembro de 1493. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 25 de março de 1531, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Scrope родилась около 1476 г. в местности упсалл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Scrope было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Greystoke, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Danby после 21 ноябрь 1493 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 25 марта 1531 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности лидс ст питир, еркшир, Англия.
